name: g2n-enterprise
summary: A platform to optimize AND run PyTorch models: license-gated compiler (enhanced planner, persistent cache, multi-accelerator routing), a quantum circuit simulator with batched parameter sweeps, plus a model registry, inference server, and local LLM runtime (int4 quantization, partial offload, hf:/gguf: sources, streaming generation), on top of open-core g2n.
author: g2n
